backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the AutoHub backend, defining CarListing, CallbackRequest, and CarInquiry types with CRUD operations, booking/receipt submission, and inquiry management using persistent Maps.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms the old actor state (with sampleListings) into the new actor state (with allListings array) during canister upgrades.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, describing each component's and page's purpose and key behaviors.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, chart colors, sidebar, etc.).
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes (Home, Listings, ListingDetail, SellCar, ResaleValueChecker, VehicleLookup) wrapped in a shared Layout with Navbar, Footer, and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/BookingModal.tsx: Dialog modal for booking a car that displays Axis Bank transfer details with copy buttons, a payment receipt file upload, and a success confirmation screen after submission.
frontend/src/components/CallbackRequestF: Collapsible card form that lets users submit a callback request (name, phone, preferred time slot) for a specific listing, with success state and reset functionality.
frontend/src/components/CarCard.tsx: Renders a card UI for a single car listing with image, badges, price formatting, and key details (mileage, year, location), linking to the listing detail page.
frontend/src/components/CarImageViewer36: Interactive 360° image viewer component that supports drag (mouse and touch) and button navigation to cycle through an array of car images.
frontend/src/components/CarInquiryForm.t: Collapsible form component that lets users submit an inquiry (name, phone, message) about a specific car listing via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/EmiCalculator.ts: Collapsible EMI calculator that computes monthly installment, total payable, and total interest based on car price, down payment, interest rate, and tenure inputs.
frontend/src/components/FinanceOptions.t: Displays a tabbed list of bank and NBFC lenders with indicative interest rates and tenure, allowing users to send a finance enquiry via a toast notification.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site-wide footer with brand info, quick navigation links, popular car brands, contact details for the owner, and a helpline section.
frontend/src/components/LocationFilter.t: A reusable location filter component with cascading state and city dropdowns for filtering by Indian states and cities, resetting city selection when the state changes.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with logo, desktop nav links, a 'List Your Car' CTA button, and a collapsible mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, identity persistence, and delegation validity checks.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including fetching, creating, and updating car listings, inquiries, and callback requests via the ICP actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Inter and Poppins fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for light/dark theme tokens (colors, radius, sidebar, charts) plus reusable component utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with TanStack QueryClientProvider and a custom InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Empty file with no content; likely a placeholder for a future admin dashboard page.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page component featuring a hero section with a search bar and location filter, a stats banner, and a grid of up to 8 featured available car listings with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/pages/ListingDetail.tsx: Detail page for a single car listing that displays an image gallery, car specs, tabbed content (EMI calculator, finance options, inquiry/callback forms), and a booking modal, with loading and error states.
frontend/src/pages/Listings.tsx: Browsable listings page with search, fuel type, transmission, location, and price range filters plus sorting options, rendering filtered and sorted car cards with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/pages/ResaleValueChecker.ts: Tool page where users input car details (make, model, year, mileage, fuel type, etc.) to receive an estimated resale value with factor breakdown, using a local resale calculator utility.
frontend/src/pages/SellCar.tsx: Multi-step form page (2 steps) for creating a car listing, collecting vehicle details in step 1 and seller/pricing info in step 2, then submitting via the useCreateListing mutation hook.
frontend/src/pages/SellCarConfirmation.t: Confirmation page shown after a car listing is submitted, displaying the listing ID, next steps, and navigation buttons to view the listing, browse all cars, or return home.
frontend/src/pages/VehicleLookup.tsx: Page that allows users to search for a car listing by registration number, displaying full vehicle details including specs, price, and masked phone number if found.
frontend/src/utils/emiCalculator.ts: Utility functions for calculating monthly EMI using the standard formula, total payable amount, total interest, and formatting amounts in INR (lakhs/crores).
frontend/src/utils/locationData.ts: Static data file exporting a comprehensive list of Indian states and their cities, plus a Pan India constant, used for location selection in forms.
frontend/src/utils/phoneNumberMasker.ts: Utility function that masks a phone number by showing only the first 4 digits followed by six asterisks for privacy.
frontend/src/utils/resaleCalculator.ts: Utility module that estimates a used car's resale value based on make, model, age, mileage, fuel type, transmission, and city, using hardcoded base prices and depreciation rules.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, animations, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the state of the Autohub used car marketplace app (version 27), including architectural notes, known issues, and a list of all existing implemented features with their IDs and versions.
